en.text: from a primary but obsolete verb νύπτω (to veil as a bride; compare Latin "nupto," to marry); a young married woman (as veiled), including a betrothed girl; by implication, a son's wife

senses.gloss_en: from a primary but obsolete verb νύπτω (to veil as a bride; compare Latin "nupto," to marry); a young married woman (as veiled), including a betrothed girl; by implication, a son's wife
